intent.operator_problem: PRD-070 bundled tier-1 rename work (WS4, done) with tier-2 shape conversion work (WS5/WS6) under one EXEC-SPEC. A mid-execution reality check revealed four classes of blast-radius gaps, a missing render-pattern decision (formatCents vs deferred <FinancialValue>), a sequencing hazard on services/visit/dtos.ts not surfaced at the PRD layer, and a demo-only surface (/review) incorrectly pulled into implementation scope. Fixing in-place triggers per-workstream escalation; a scoped child PRD is the correct remedy.
intent.pilot_fit: Final architectural step to make the Financial Data Distribution Standard true at the visit-anchored service boundary. Every currency value leaving services/visit/ and services/rating-slip/ (in its visit-live-view role) will carry explicit authority, source, and completeness. Coherent single slice because both DTO shapes converge on services/visit/dtos.ts, both use the same Pattern A data flow, and both have the same test-file-birth requirement.
success_outcomes: RecentSessionDTO total_buy_in/total_cash_out/net typed as FinancialValue (not number).
Zero '/100' dollar conversions in services/visit/crud.ts and services/rating-slip/mappers.ts visit-live-view path.
Zod wire vs DTO partition made explicit (wire Zod stays bare z.number(), outbound Zod decided by lead-architect).
Every envelope emission carries authority, source, completeness.status — no omissions.
UI consumers render via formatCents(envelope.value) from lib/format.ts — no <FinancialValue>, no inline /100.
New test files app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/recent-sessions/__tests__/route.test.ts and app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/live-view/__tests__/route.test.ts exist and assert envelope shape at wire.
WS5 ships before WS6 (services/visit/dtos.ts serialization invariant honored) OR both land in one atomic commit.
Grep gate: zero remaining bare-number currency typings in the declared blast radius.
explicit_exclusions: Former app/review/ demo/design-review surface was deleted from the repo on 2026-04-24; any future mock/demo surface remains out of scope for this slice
Shift-intelligence authority routing (WS7B) — different bounded context, different pattern, separate FIB
Phase 1.1 verification matrix + rollback package + Phase 1.2 handoff (WS9) — stays under PRD-070 closing gate
SQL migrations — RPCs already emit bare cents, no DDL or function rewrite needed
pit_cash_observation.amount dollar→cents column migration — Wave 2 scope
Broad API / OpenAPI envelope migration across remaining routes — Phase 1.2 scope
Broad UI visual migration — Phase 1.3 scope
Shift-intelligence deferred public fields (AnomalyAlertDTO.observedValue etc.) — Phase 1.2 per GATE-070.6
rating-slip-modal totalChipsOut rename — already landed as WS4
Any future demo-surface tests remain out of scope for this slice

WS9 also depends on WS7B; belongs to whichever workstream closes last
Contradicts PRD-070 §87; formatCents(envelope.value) is one-line and not tech debt

adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: EXEC-070 WS9 verification matrix requires both files; deferring creates a WS9 gap

entities.name: RecentSessionDTO
entities.description: Visit continuation response item; aggregates per-session totals for the last N visits of a player

entities.name: VisitLiveViewDTO
entities.description: Aggregated live view of an active visit's session totals across all rating slips

entities.name: FinancialValue
entities.description: Canonical envelope emitted at service boundaries for currency values

entities.name: visit_financial_summary
entities.description: View/aggregate table feeding both RPCs with bare-cent totals

relationships: RecentSessionDTO is emitted by services/visit/crud.ts getPlayerRecentSessions via rpc_get_player_recent_sessions
VisitLiveViewDTO is emitted by services/rating-slip/crud.ts getVisitLiveView via rpc_get_visit_live_view and the mapper in services/rating-slip/mappers.ts
Both DTOs are declared in services/visit/dtos.ts — shared file, serialization hazard between WS5 and WS6
visit_financial_summary is the source of truth feeding both RPC paths; every in-scope envelope declares source as a path starting with 'visit_financial_summary.'

capabilities.name: Mapper wraps bare cents into FinancialValue envelope
capabilities.description: New mapper in services/visit/mappers.ts (recent-sessions path) and existing toVisitLiveViewDTO in services/rating-slip/mappers.ts wrap each currency field into FinancialValue with authority='actual', explicit source, and completeness.status set by the WAVE-1-CLASSIFICATION-RULES §5.1 decision tree (never omitted)

capabilities.name: CRUD removes dollar pre-conversion
capabilities.description: services/visit/crud.ts L516-522 /100 conversion block deleted; services/rating-slip/mappers.ts L340-342 /100 conversion deleted; DTO carries cents natively via envelope

capabilities.name: Route handler passes envelope DTO through unchanged
capabilities.description: app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/recent-sessions/route.ts and app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/live-view/route.ts do not perform dollar/cents math; they propagate the envelope-shaped DTO

capabilities.name: UI consumer unwraps envelope and renders via formatCents
capabilities.description: components/player-sessions/start-from-previous.tsx and components/player-sessions/start-from-previous-modal.tsx read dto.<currency>.value and render via formatCents from lib/format.ts; no <FinancialValue> component (deferred to 1.3), no inline /100 math

capabilities.name: Route-boundary tests born
capabilities.description: New test directories and files created for recent-sessions and live-view routes; tests assert envelope shape at the wire: type present, source non-empty, completeness.status present, value is integer

capabilities.name: Wire/DTO Zod partition explicit
capabilities.description: Decision recorded in EXEC-SPEC: wire-format Zod validator continues to validate bare z.number() matching RPC JSONB; outbound DTO Zod using financialValueSchema is either added or explicitly declined with rationale

excluded_surfaces.reason: Deleted from the repo on 2026-04-24. If a demo/design-review surface is reintroduced later, it remains outside this slice.
Does not exist yet; <FinancialValue> component is Phase 1.3 scope.

business_rules.statement: Every currency field in RecentSessionDTO and VisitLiveViewDTO emits a FinancialValue envelope; bare number is rejected at the service boundary.
completeness.status is always explicit (complete|partial|unknown). Mappers that cannot determine completeness set 'unknown' — never omit.
authority and source are mapper-owned. Consumers (routes, UI) MUST NOT infer or override these fields.
FinancialValue.value is canonical cents (integer). No dollar representation at the service boundary.
Zero '/100' dollar conversion remains in services/visit/crud.ts or services/rating-slip/mappers.ts visit-live-view path after migration.
WS5 and WS6 do not execute in parallel because services/visit/dtos.ts is shared. Either WS5 closes before WS6 starts, or both land in one atomic commit.
UI consumers in scope render via formatCents(envelope.value) from lib/format.ts. No <FinancialValue> component usage in Phase 1.1. No inline /100 math.
Wire-format Zod (recentSessionsRpcResponseSchema) tracks the RPC output, not the DTO. It continues to validate bare z.number() matching JSONB emission.
Demo-only surfaces are excluded from implementation. The former app/review/ tree has already been deleted from the repo; any future mock/demo surface remains independent follow-on work.

triggers: RPC invocation returns bare cents JSONB → mapper wraps → DTO emitted
Route handler consumes DTO from service → passes through without math → wire
UI mounts, calls route, receives envelope-shaped DTO → renders via formatCents(.value)
CI test run → route-boundary suite exercises envelope shape assertions

loop.action: rpc_get_player_recent_sessions / rpc_get_visit_live_view returns bare cents in JSONB (unchanged)
recentSessionsRpcResponseSchema validates bare z.number() matching the RPC (unchanged)
Wraps each currency field into FinancialValue with authority='actual', explicit source, completeness.status per §5.1 decision tree
Exports envelope-shaped DTO; /100 conversion blocks deleted
Passes DTO through unchanged; no dollar/cents math at transport layer
Asserts envelope shape at wire (new file, born in this slice)
Reads dto.<field>.value and renders via formatCents; no <FinancialValue>, no inline /100

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: Does an outbound DTO Zod schema built on financialValueSchema get added at the DTO boundary, or is wire-Zod the only validator (with types enforcing DTO shape)?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.recommendation: Decline the outbound validator unless a consumer needs runtime shape enforcement — static types are sufficient and runtime Zod at the DTO boundary adds cost without signal since the mapper is the authority.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: How does the mapper resolve completeness.status when visit_financial_summary.total_in is null vs zero vs missing row?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.recommendation: null / missing → status='unknown' with value=0; zero → status='complete' with value=0. Document convention in mapper JSDoc.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: What exact source string convention? 'visit_financial_summary.total_in' vs 'visit.financial.total_in' vs casino-scoped format?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.recommendation: Use table.column dotted path ('visit_financial_summary.total_in') for traceability back to the source of record.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: Single EXEC-SPEC or atomic commit for WS5 + WS6 given the shared services/visit/dtos.ts file?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.recommendation: Single EXEC-SPEC with two sequential workstreams; atomic commit preferred to avoid intermediate broken-build states.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: Scope of the two new route-boundary test files — smoke-test only (one success path + one envelope assertion) or broader coverage?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.recommendation: Smoke-test parity with existing modal-data route test scope: one success case asserting envelope shape, one 404, one unauthorized. Expand in Phase 1.2 when the broader API envelope rollout lands.

governance.expansion_trigger_rule: Amend this brief if any downstream artifact proposes: (a) introducing a new demo/design-review surface into this blast radius, including any future /review revival; (b) using <FinancialValue> component in 1.1; (c) inline /100 math at any layer; (d) skipping either route-boundary test file birth; (e) widening scope beyond visit + rating-slip-visit-live-view; (f) parallel WS5+WS6 execution; (g) SQL migration at the visit RPC layer; (h) outbound Zod without lead-architect sign-off on the wire-vs-DTO partition.

shared_primitives: lib/financial/rounding.ts (dollarsToCents — not used in this slice, RPCs already return cents)
lib/format.ts (formatCents — canonical interim UI render path in Phase 1.1)

companion_fib_not_yet_drafted.why_separate: Different bounded context, different pattern (mapper helper + alert path parity, not shape conversion)
